V0053_01_00_00_0.text: You won't last an instant against me!

V0053_01_00_01_0.text:
Will you pose a challenge?
Or be weak like all the rest!

V0053_01_00_02_0.text: When I have all three Egyptian Gods, I will rule the throne!

V0053_01_00_03_0.text: Only a fool like you would seek their own demise!

V0053_01_00_04_0.text: This Duel among the chosen ones is millennia in the making!

V0053_01_00_05_0.text: You've given me nothing but scars, Pharaoh!

V0053_01_00_06_0.text: Once I'm through with you, I will finally have my freedom!

V0053_01_00_07_0.text:
You're not the one I want to Duel.
You're just a vessel!

V0053_01_00_08_0.text:
Seto Kaiba...
The one who wields his own Egyptian God...

V0053_01_00_09_0.text:
Heh heh heh!
I'm going to make you my puppet, Wheeler!

V0053_01_00_10_0.text:
Bakura...
Should I team with you...
Or erase you...

V0053_01_00_12_0.text: Odion, do you really think I'll fall for one of your traps?

V0053_01_00_13_0.text:
It's you...
The evil that I created...

V0053_01_00_14_0.text: I'll test the power of the Egyptian Gods on my minions.

V0053_03_00_00_0.text: In mere seconds, your existence will come to an end!

V0053_03_00_01_0.text: The only choice you have left is how you want to lose!

V0053_03_00_03_0.text: My game is only getting started.

V0053_03_00_05_0.text:
You've been predicting my moves...
How interesting.

V0053_05_00_00_0.text: Egyptian Gods, let your divine strength flow through me!

V0053_06_01_01_0.text: Are you sure you want to do that?

V0053_06_01_02_0.text: Things will not go as you hoped!

V0053_07_09_00_0.text: This is the card I Set!

V0053_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0053_14_00_01_0.text: I'm moving to the Battle Phase!

V0053_16_00_00_0.text: Your existence was short and unmemorable.

V0053_16_00_01_0.text:
Heh heh.
This was fun while it lasted!

V0053_21_00_00_0.text:
Keep fighting!
I love seeing the fear in your eyes!

V0053_21_00_01_0.text: Do you have a single card in your Deck that can threaten me?

V0053_21_00_02_0.text: Whatever you plan to do next turn, I'm not afraid.

V0053_21_00_03_0.text: This turn was another small step towards my victory.

V0053_21_00_04_0.text: I was going to end you quickly, but I prefer to punish you.

V0053_21_00_05_0.text:
Go ahead and attack me!
I'm ready to strike you back!

V0053_28_00_00_0.text:
There is no way to defeat me.
Absolutely none!

V0053_28_00_01_0.text: I'm not a coward who gets scared over a single Set card!

V0053_28_00_02_0.text:
Don't get up.
You deserve to crawl on the ground!

V0053_28_00_03_0.text: No strategy can work against an Egyptian God!

V0053_28_00_04_0.text:
Hahahaha!
Your monsters are nothing like my Egyptian God!

V0053_28_00_05_0.text: The three Egyptian Gods will crown me as the true Pharaoh!

V0053_28_00_05_1.text: And I will be free from the curse of your existence!

V0053_28_00_06_0.text: How does if feel to lose everything you love?

V0053_28_00_06_1.text: That's the same burden you placed upon me as a Gravekeeper!

V0053_28_00_07_0.text:
You should be proud.
You Dueled well for a vessel!

V0053_28_00_08_0.text: Your Deck even freaks me out, Bakura!

V0053_28_00_10_0.text:
All the Egyptian Gods will be mine.
Along with the throne!

V0053_28_00_12_0.text: Since you lost the Duel, you must accept my punishment.

V0053_29_00_01_0.text:
Whatever.
A Duel this pointless is easy to brush off.

V0053_29_00_02_0.text:
I'm sure we'll meet again.
Enjoy the time you have left.

V0053_29_00_03_0.text:
I figured out how your Deck works.
You won't win next time.

V0053_29_00_05_0.text: How could a measly vessel do this to me!

V0053_29_00_06_0.text: Do you think us Gravekeepers will ever be free...?

V0053_29_00_07_0.text: Odion, you're taking the fun away from everything!

V0053_33_00_00_0.text: I'll show you what a perfect Duel looks like!

V0053_33_00_01_0.text: Witness the ultimate union of skill and strength!

V0053_33_00_02_0.text: The Egyptian Gods are impossible to defeat!

V0053_30_00_00_0.text: We may both be Duelists, but you're nothing like me.

V0053_30_00_01_0.text: My instincts are always on point!

V0053_30_00_02_0.text: It's so amusing to watch you try.

V0053_34_00_00_0.text:
You don't need to think so hard.
You're gonna lose anyway.

V0053_34_00_01_0.text: I can create new strategies on the fly.

V0053_34_00_02_0.text: Frightened over a single facedown card?

V0053_34_00_03_0.text: That was just a test to see how strong of a Duelist you are.

V0053_34_00_04_0.text: There's more depth to you than it seems.

V0053_34_00_05_0.text: You only have three turns left in this Duel!

V0053_34_00_06_0.text: This isn't a monster. It's a God!

V0053_34_00_07_0.text: This ultimate combo cannot be defeated!

V0053_34_00_08_0.text: I'll let you switch it to Defense Position if you want.

V0053_34_00_09_0.text: Oh no... This is an infinite loop!

V0053_34_00_10_0.text: I infuse my desire for revenge into this card!

V0053_34_00_11_0.text: I feel the anger of my Egyptian God burning in my Deck...

V0053_34_00_12_0.text:
My name is Namu.
I'm sure we'll become excellent friends.

V0053_32_00_01_0.text:
A battle millennia in the making!
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!

V0053_35_00_00_0.text:
My name is Marik.
Marik Ishtar.

V0053_35_00_01_0.text:
Hahaha...
After thousands of years, the battle begins!

V0053_36_00_00_0.text:
Aren't I nice?
I'm letting you have the final glory.

V0053_36_00_02_0.text: My plan isn't proceeding as I hoped...

V0053_36_00_05_0.text:
Argh!
Why won't you do my bidding!

V0053_36_00_07_0.text: Go and play with those fools.

V0053_36_00_08_0.text: Odion, bring this farce to an end.

V0053_36_00_09_0.text:
Odion...
Use your Traps to decimate them.

V0053_36_00_10_0.text:
Odion...
It's not smart to make me worry.

V0053_36_00_11_0.text: I hope you Duel well, sister.

V0053_08_00_00_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Blaze Cannon!

V0053_08_00_01_0.text: I can Tribute my monsters to raise Ra's ATK this turn!

V0053_08_00_02_0.text: My Winged Dragon's attack will destroy all your monsters!

V0053_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Ancient Chant!

V0053_08_00_03_1.text: By reciting this chant, the Egyptian God will obey me!

V0053_08_00_04_0.text: I banish Ancient Chant from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0053_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
The True Sun God!

V0053_08_00_05_1.text: Who knew the deity of the sun harnessed such power...

V0053_08_00_06_0.text: I activate The True Sun God's effect!

V0053_08_00_07_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Millennium Revelation!

V0053_08_00_07_1.text: This is a revelation even I knew nothing of!

V0053_08_00_09_0.text: I send Millennium Revelation to the Graveyard!

V0053_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Ultimate Divine-Beast!

V0053_08_00_11_1.text:
This is no monster.
It's a God!

V0053_08_00_12_0.text: No effect can harm an Egyptian God.

V0053_08_00_13_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Sun God Unification!

V0053_08_00_13_1.text: Who knew the deity of the sun harnessed such power...

V0053_08_00_14_0.text: I pay my LP to activate Sun God Unification's effect!

V0053_08_00_15_0.text: I offer up my Ra to activate Sun God Unification's effect!

V0053_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Thunderforce Attack!

V0053_08_00_17_0.text: This Duel is about to get interesting!

V0053_08_00_17_1.text:
My Continuous Spell Card!
Jam Breeding Machine!

V0053_08_00_19_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap Card!
Jam Defender!

V0053_08_00_21_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Metal Reflect Slime!

V0053_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Monster Reborn!

V0053_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Monster Rebirth!

V0053_08_00_24_0.text: With this card, I will get my revenge!

V0053_08_00_26_1.text:
How does it feel to be locked up?
To lose your freedom?

V0053_08_00_27_0.text: The Continuous Spell Card, Vengeful Bog Spirit!

V0053_08_00_28_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Machine Duplication!

V0053_08_00_29_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Pot of Greed!

V0053_08_00_30_0.text: I equip Black Pendant to a monster!

V0053_08_00_31_0.text:
Heh heh...
Take Black Pendant's effect!

V0053_08_00_32_0.text: The Spell Card, Left Arm Offering!

V0053_08_00_33_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell Card!
Card of Safe Return!

V0053_08_00_34_0.text: Card of Safe Return's effect activates!

V0053_08_00_35_0.text: The Quick-Play Spell, Spell of Pain!

V0053_08_00_36_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Card of Sanctity!

V0053_08_00_37_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Magical Stone Excavation!

V0053_08_00_38_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Tribute Burial!

V0053_08_00_39_0.text: While this card is active, my hand is limitless!

V0053_08_00_41_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, De-Fusion!

V0053_08_00_42_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Remove Trap!

V0053_08_00_43_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Relieve Monster!

V0053_08_00_44_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Dark Spell Regeneration!

V0053_08_00_45_0.text: I activate Dark Spell Regeneration from my Graveyard!

V0053_08_00_46_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Card of Last Will!

V0053_08_00_47_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Hidden Soldiers!

V0053_08_00_48_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Coffin Seller!

V0053_08_00_49_0.text: Coffin Seller's effect deals you damage!

V0053_08_00_50_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Nightmare Wheel!

V0053_08_00_52_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Malevolent Catastrophe!

V0053_08_00_53_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Mirror Force!

V0053_08_00_54_0.text: Since you chose to play the game, you must pay the price.

V0053_08_00_55_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Rope of Life!

V0053_08_00_56_0.text:
This is a favorite among the Rare Hunters!
Lightning Vortex!

V0053_08_00_57_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Gravekeeper's Inscription!

V0053_09_00_00_0.text: The Winged Dragon of Ra has abilities no one has ever seen!

V0053_09_00_01_0.text: Behold the true form of Ra!

V0053_09_00_02_0.text: Only the chosen can tap into the power of an Egyptian God!

V0053_09_00_04_0.text:
Witness Ra's true might!
Egyptian God Phoenix!

V0053_09_00_06_0.text: Slifer the Sky Dragon activates its effect!

V0053_09_00_06_2.text:
This is no monster.
It's a God!

V0053_09_00_07_0.text: No effect can harm an Egyptian God.

V0053_09_00_08_0.text: Lava Golem's magma melts away your LP.

V0053_09_00_10_0.text: Summoning Byser Shock returns all Set cards to our hands!

V0053_09_00_11_0.text:
Helpoemer's effect!
Listen to the elegy of the beyond!

V0053_09_00_13_0.text: The perfect defense against any enemy attack!

V0053_09_00_16_0.text: Juragedo activates its effect from my hand!

V0053_09_00_19_0.text: Newdoria's effect activates when it's destroyed in battle!

V0053_09_00_22_0.text: I activate Holding Legs's effect from my Graveyard!

V0053_37_00_00_0.text: Envelop the deserts with your glow and cast your rage!

V0053_13_00_00_0.text:
Appear as I call your name!
The Winged Dragon of Ra!

V0053_13_00_01_0.text:
Appear!
The Winged Dragon of Ra - Sphere Mode!

V0053_37_00_01_0.text: Witness The Winged Dragon's true form!

V0053_13_00_02_0.text: The Winged Dragon of Ra - Immortal Phoenix!

V0053_37_00_02_0.text: Let your eyes behold the majesty of Slifer the Sky Dragon!

V0053_13_00_03_1.text: One of the three Egyptian God Cards!

V0053_37_00_03_0.text: I will sacrifice your monsters to Special Summon mine!

V0053_13_00_05_0.text: The Fusion Monster, Humanoid Worm Drake!

V0053_13_00_09_0.text: If this plasma can take on any form, why not the strongest!

V0053_13_00_12_0.text: This shapeless being is utterly indestructible!

V0053_13_00_15_0.text: I Special Summon a Slime Token!

V0053_13_00_27_0.text: I Special Summon a Lekunga Token!

V0053_19_00_12_0.text: This plasma can transform into the sharpest of swords!

V0053_27_00_02_0.text: This can't be happening to me...
